final_output:
=== PHASE 1: PRODUCT FEATURES ===
1. Feature Name: Email Ingestion System
   - Description: This feature allows seamless integration with email services via SMTP, IMAP, and RESTful APIs. It enables real-time email retrieval and preprocessing to extract relevant metadata and content.
   - Key Functionality: Integration with various email services, real-time retrieval of emails, extraction of metadata (sender, recipient, subject, timestamp).
   - User Benefit: Users benefit from a system that can efficiently retrieve and process incoming emails in real-time, ensuring timely responses and accurate handling of email communications.

2. Feature Name: Message Classification Module
   - Description: This feature utilizes LLM-based classifiers to analyze email content and determine intent and category. It assigns confidence scores to decide between automated responses and manual handling.
   - Key Functionality: Analyzing email content, determining intent and category, assigning confidence scores for decision-making.
   - User Benefit: Users benefit from accurate classification of emails, ensuring that responses are appropriately automated or manually handled based on the content and context of the messages.

3. Feature Name: Knowledge Base Integration
   - Description: This feature implements a vector database for efficient storage and retrieval of organizational knowledge. It includes a continuous learning mechanism to update the knowledge base with new information from resolved inquiries.
   - Key Functionality: Storing and retrieving organizational knowledge efficiently, updating the knowledge base with new information.
   - User Benefit: Users benefit from access to a comprehensive knowledge base that can provide relevant information for responding to inquiries, improving response accuracy and consistency.

4. Feature Name: Response Generation Engine
   - Description: This feature deploys a RAG system to generate contextually accurate and human-like responses. It includes an approval workflow for reviewing and editing automated responses before dispatch.
   - Key Functionality: Generating contextually accurate responses, enabling human review and editing of responses.
   - User Benefit: Users benefit from the system's ability to generate responses that are accurate, relevant, and human-like, enhancing communication quality and efficiency.

5. Feature Name: Routing Logic
   - Description: This feature involves the development of a rules-based engine to assign emails to appropriate SMEs based on content analysis. It includes context-aware forwarding that includes relevant metadata and previous correspondence history.
   - Key Functionality: Assigning emails to SMEs based on content analysis, context-aware forwarding.
   - User Benefit: Users benefit from emails being routed to the right subject matter experts efficiently, ensuring that inquiries are handled by the most suitable individuals, improving response accuracy and speed.

6. Feature Name: User Interface
   - Description: This feature includes the creation of a comprehensive dashboard for monitoring system performance, metrics on response times, and accuracy. It provides a configuration panel for managing the knowledge base, routing rules, and system settings. It also allows manual override options for human intervention when necessary.
   - Key Functionality: Displaying performance metrics, offering configuration options, allowing manual intervention.
   - User Benefit: Users benefit from a user-friendly interface that provides insights into system performance, allows for easy management of settings, and enables human intervention when needed for personalized handling of emails.

=== PHASE 2: USER STORIES ===
As a Customer Support Representative, I want the Email Ingestion System to seamlessly integrate with email services via SMTP, IMAP, and RESTful APIs so that I can efficiently retrieve and process incoming emails in real-time, ensuring timely responses and accurate handling of email communications.

As an IT Administrator, I want the Message Classification Module to utilize LLM-based classifiers to analyze email content and determine intent and category so that emails can be accurately classified for appropriate handling, improving overall efficiency.

As a Subject Matter Expert (SME), I want the Knowledge Base Integration feature to implement a vector database for efficient storage and retrieval of organizational knowledge so that I can access relevant information quickly to respond to inquiries accurately and consistently.

As a Customer Support Representative, I want the Response Generation Engine to deploy a RAG system to generate contextually accurate and human-like responses so that I can provide high-quality responses to customers efficiently.

As an IT Administrator, I want the Routing Logic feature to develop a rules-based engine to assign emails to appropriate SMEs based on content analysis so that emails are routed to the right individuals efficiently, improving response accuracy and speed.

As a Subject Matter Expert (SME), I want the User Interface to provide a comprehensive dashboard for monitoring system performance and metrics on response times and accuracy so that I can track my performance and efficiency in handling inquiries.

=== PHASE 3: DEVELOPMENT TASKS ===
**User Story 1: As a Customer Support Representative, I want the Email Ingestion System to seamlessly integrate with email services via SMTP, IMAP, and RESTful APIs so that I can efficiently retrieve and process incoming emails in real-time, ensuring timely responses and accurate handling of email communications.**

- **Task 1.1**
  - **Task ID:** 1.1
  - **Related User Story:** User Story 1
  - **Description:** Implement integration with SMTP protocol for email retrieval.
  - **Acceptance Criteria:** The system can connect to designated email services using SMTP and retrieve incoming messages.
  - **Estimated Effort:** 8 hours
  - **Dependencies:** None

- **Task 1.2**
  - **Task ID:** 1.2
  - **Related User Story:** User Story 1
  - **Description:** Implement integration with IMAP protocol for email retrieval.
  - **Acceptance Criteria:** The system can connect to designated email services using IMAP and retrieve incoming messages.
  - **Estimated Effort:** 8 hours
  - **Dependencies:** None

- **Task 1.3**
  - **Task ID:** 1.3
  - **Related User Story:** User Story 1
  - **Description:** Implement integration with RESTful APIs for email retrieval.
  - **Acceptance Criteria:** The system can connect to designated email services using RESTful APIs and retrieve incoming messages.
  - **Estimated Effort:** 12 hours
  - **Dependencies:** None

**User Story 2: As an IT Administrator, I want the Message Classification Module to utilize LLM-based classifiers to analyze email content and determine intent and category so that emails can be accurately classified for appropriate handling, improving overall efficiency.**

- **Task 2.1**
  - **Task ID:** 2.1
  - **Related User Story:** User Story 2
  - **Description:** Develop LLM-based classifiers for email content analysis.
  - **Acceptance Criteria:** The system can accurately determine the intent and category of incoming emails using LLM-based models.
  - **Estimated Effort:** 20 hours
  - **Dependencies:** None

- **Task 2.2**
  - **Task ID:** 2.2
  - **Related User Story:** User Story 2
  - **Description:** Assign confidence scores to classification results.
  - **Acceptance Criteria:** Each email classification has an associated confidence score guiding subsequent actions.
  - **Estimated Effort:** 10 hours
  - **Dependencies:** Task 2.1

**User Story 3: As a Subject Matter Expert (SME), I want the Knowledge Base Integration feature to implement a vector database for efficient storage and retrieval of organizational knowledge so that I can access relevant information quickly to respond to inquiries accurately and consistently.**

- **Task 3.1**
  - **Task ID:** 3.1
  - **Related User Story:** User Story 3
  - **Description:** Design and implement a vector database for storing organizational knowledge.
  - **Acceptance Criteria:** The system can efficiently store and retrieve relevant information from the knowledge base.
  - **Estimated Effort:** 16 hours
  - **Dependencies:** None

- **Task 3.2**
  - **Task ID:** 3.2
  - **Related User Story:** User Story 3
  - **Description:** Implement continuous learning mechanism to update the knowledge base.
  - **Acceptance Criteria:** The knowledge base is updated with new information from resolved inquiries.
  - **Estimated Effort:** 12 hours
  - **Dependencies:** Task 3.1

These tasks provide a detailed breakdown of the development work required to implement the specified user stories. Each task is defined with a clear title, description, acceptance criteria, estimated effort, and any dependencies on other tasks.
